steps.title: Map the study sequence
steps.content: The passage describes convergent evolution, then gives two studies of it: Chen and colleagues on shared genetic mechanisms and Zwaan and colleagues on different genetic mechanisms. It then mentions Green and Extavour's third study of both types.

steps.title: Reject added claims
steps.content: A adds speculation about future studies, B invents an assumption being disproved, and C invents a critique while reversing the focus. The actual structure is phenomenon, two study examples, and a third study of the same phenomenon. The answer is D.
